title: Why You're Working Hard But Still Falling Behind (Master These Skills)
description: If it feels like you're working harder than ever but still falling behind, this video is for you. Sandeep Swadia, former CEO and board member across several tech companies, shares the 7 high-income habits that transformed how he works, decides, and grows. Each habit is inspired by a legendary figure, from Jensen Huang to Jony Ive, and backed by neuroscience, psychology, and real-world experience. These are the internal skills top performers use to turn pressure into performance, chaos into clarity, and work into something that actually matters.
